error TS-1: Pre-emit (0) and post-emit (1) diagnostic counts do not match! This can indicate that a semantic _error_ was added by the emit resolver - such an error may not be reflected on the command line or in the editor, but may be captured in a baseline here!


!!! error TS-1: Pre-emit (0) and post-emit (1) diagnostic counts do not match! This can indicate that a semantic _error_ was added by the emit resolver - such an error may not be reflected on the command line or in the editor, but may be captured in a baseline here!
!!! related TS-1: The excess diagnostics are:
!!! related TS2708 internalAliasUninitializedModuleInsideLocalModuleWithExport.ts:10:23: Cannot use namespace 'a' as a value.
==== internalAliasUninitializedModuleInsideLocalModuleWithExport.ts (0 errors) ====
    export namespace a {
        export namespace b {
            export interface I {
                foo();
            }
        }
    }
    
    export namespace c {
        export import b = a.b;
        export var x: b.I;
        x.foo();
    }
